features.label: Mission
features.title: Our Mission
features.description: To provide safe, affordable, and expert-led healthcare for all—by harnessing digital innovation that is locally grounded, culturally appropriate, and scalable across low-resource settings.

features.label: Vision
features.title: Our Vision
features.description: A continent where no life is lost due to distance, poverty, or lack of a health worker—by building a future where quality care reaches every person, everywhere.

features.label: Why us?
features.title: What Makes Us Different?
features.highlight: "Tenachin is the first full-spectrum, multilingual telehealth platform tailored to Sub-Saharan Africa. Designed by Ethiopian doctors."
features.description: We integrate with existing health systems, ensuring efficiency, accessibility, and sustainable trust across communities.
